title: Logical Flowchart Generation
scenario: Generate a logical flowchart representing a simple banking system with the following steps: Log In, Check Balance, Withdraw, Deposit, Log Out. The flowchart should display the correct logical flow between each step, with correct use of AND and OR gates.
constraints: Must be represented as a single line of text using logical operators

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the resulting flowchart well-formed and correctly represents the logical flow?
Does the flowchart correctly display the logical flow between each step, with correct use of AND and OR gates?
Is the flowchart represented as a single line of text using logical operators?
